name: dead-letter-next-action
flowGoal: Classify dead-letter events as unresolved, historical, or orphaned and show the correct next action.
successCondition: Dead-letter rows include a replay, audit, or orphan-resolution action instead of a raw Redis error only.

signals: Failed runs point operators to pnpm run:replay <runId> --fail-on-not-ready
Resolved dead-letter rows are marked historical
Orphaned dead-letter rows tell operators to recover the missing run record first
buildDeadLetterNextAction returns replay guidance for unresolved run-scoped failures
buildDeadLetterNextAction returns historical audit guidance for resolved failures
buildDeadLetterNextAction returns missing-run guidance for orphaned failures
nextActions: Find the missing run in InsForge or the local fallback store

verification.successCondition: Dead-letter recovery guidance covers failed, resolved, and orphaned cases.
